utility_evaluation.REASONING:

6. additional_services: ✓ INCLUDED - Dining services specified with restaurant examples and cost estimate (€80 per day, €400 total for 5 days)
7. total_budget: ✓ INCLUDED - Total cost provided (€1,675) with breakdown across all categories

All 7 items from the required format are present in the final package with appropriate details including specific names, dates, and costs as requested.
